Uses of Class
exceptions.EmptyQueueException

  • Packages that use EmptyQueueException 
    Package Description
    implementations
    Contains concrete implementations of the Dictionary ADT.
    unitTests  
    utilities
    Contains interfaces and utility classes used by the Dictionary ADT.

    • Uses of EmptyQueueException in implementations

      Methods in implementations that throw EmptyQueueException 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      E MyQueue.dequeue()
      Removes and returns the element at the front of this queue.
      E MyQueue.peek()
      Returns the element at the front of this queue without removing it.

    • Uses of EmptyQueueException in unitTests

      Methods in unitTests that throw EmptyQueueException 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void QueueTest.testDequeue_Front()
      Test method for MyQueue.dequeue() to remove the first item in the queue.
      void QueueTest.testEnqueue()
      Test method for MyQueue.enqueue(java.lang.Object).
      void QueueTest.testEquals_False()
      Test method for MyQueue.equals(utilities.QueueADT) to return false when two queues are not equal.
      void QueueTest.testPeek_First()
      Test method for MyQueue.peek() to return the first item in the queue.

    • Uses of EmptyQueueException in utilities

      Methods in utilities that throw EmptyQueueException 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      E QueueADT.dequeue()
      Removes and returns the element at the front of this queue.
      E QueueADT.peek()
      Returns the element at the front of this queue without removing it.
